title: Black String
body:
This mod adds black string a new item that can be used in normal string recipes and jungle spider which drops the string and another new item a poisonous spider fang which can be used for a new weapon called Fang Blade it gives weakness for a 1 second and poison for 2.5 seconds onto enemies, also adds black string boots which give speed 2 whenever u wear them, it also changes recipe for leads like in 1.21.6 slimeball has been replaced with a string and nametag recipe too 2 papers, iron ingot and a string. Oh and also it makes normal spiders not spawn in all 3 types of jungles, and the jungle spider of course spawns in those 3 jungles.

Made in MCreator
